name: M365 Licensing Report
summary: Review assigned licenses, unlicensed users, and SKU consumption across the tenant.
description: Collects tenant SKU inventory and user license assignments, then exports a light HTML dashboard with SKU consumption, unlicensed users, and multi-license visibility.
outputs: Writes an HTML licensing dashboard to the configured output directory.

fields.label: Only paid licenses
fields.helpText: Best-effort filter that excludes common free and trial SKUs from the report.

fields.label: Include paid add-ons
fields.helpText: When paid licenses only is enabled, include paid add-ons and storage SKUs in addition to user licenses.

fields.label: Tenant ID or Domain
fields.helpText: Optional. If provided, device-code sign-in is scoped to this tenant.

prerequisites: PowerShell 7 and backend Microsoft Graph modules available in the execution container
Microsoft 365 admin sign-in by device code when prompted
Microsoft Graph permissions required by the selected workflow

examples.title: Default tenant-wide run
examples.description: Use the default field values and authenticate when the device-code prompt appears.

examples.title: Scoped admin review
examples.description: Provide a tenant id or domain to scope authentication to the expected Microsoft 365 tenant.
